transcript:
CALLER: Hello, I want to shift my appointment from morning to evening if possible. I have a 10 AM slot but I just got a meeting scheduled.
AGENT: Sure thing! May I know your name and which doctor you're scheduled with?
CALLER: Pooja Nambiar. Uh, Dr. Ramesh Kulkarni, the cardiologist.
AGENT: Ms. Nambiar, I can see your appointment. Dr. Kulkarni has an evening slot at 6 PM on the same day. Would that work?
CALLER: 6 PM is perfect actually, yes.
AGENT: Done! Your appointment is rescheduled from 10 AM to 6 PM with Dr. Kulkarni. You'll get an updated SMS. Anything else?
CALLER: No, that's all. You were very quick, thank you!
AGENT: Happy to help! See you in the evening, Ms. Nambiar.
